title: Add persistent event photo storage and management for organizers

requirements.summary: Add event photo upload interface to the OrganizerDashboard page with file input supporting JPG, PNG, and WebP formats, upload progress indicator, and preview of uploaded images
acceptanceCriteria: File input accepts image files (JPG, PNG, WebP)
Shows upload progress during file transfer
Displays preview thumbnails of uploaded images
Upload interface is accessible from organizer dashboard

file_operations.description: Create event photo upload component following the PortfolioUpload.tsx pattern. Use the blob-storage component's ExternalBlob.fromBytes() for file conversion and withUploadProgress() for progress tracking. Validate file types (JPG, PNG, WebP) and size limits (5MB max). Display upload progress indicator and preview thumbnails of uploaded images. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire the EventPhotoUpload component into the organizer dashboard layout. Add a new section below the portfolio gallery section labeled 'Event Photos' that includes the EventPhotoUpload component. Ensure proper spacing and layout consistency with existing dashboard sections.

requirements.summary: Create an event photo gallery component that displays all uploaded event photos in a grid layout with full-size lightbox view and navigation controls
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery displays all event photos uploaded by the organizer
Clicking photo opens full-size lightbox modal
Lightbox includes navigation controls to browse photos

file_operations.description: Create event photo gallery component following the PortfolioGallery.tsx pattern. Display photos in a responsive grid layout using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL() for image rendering. Implement lightbox modal with full-size image view and keyboard navigation (arrow keys, escape). Use the blob-storage component for image display. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire the EventPhotoGallery component into the organizer dashboard layout. Add the gallery component to the 'Event Photos' section below the EventPhotoUpload component. Ensure the gallery refreshes when new photos are uploaded.

requirements.summary: Add delete buttons to each event photo in the gallery that trigger deleteEventPhoto backend call with confirmation dialog before deletion
acceptanceCriteria: Each photo has a visible delete button
Successfully deleted photos are removed from gallery immediately
Error handling for failed deletions with user feedback

file_operations.description: Add delete functionality to each photo in the gallery. Display a delete button overlay on hover for each photo. Implement confirmation dialog using native confirm() or a modal component. Call the useDeleteEventPhoto hook on confirmation. Handle success by displaying toast notification and removing the photo from the gallery. Handle errors with toast error messages.

requirements.summary: Create React Query hooks for event photo operations: useUploadEventPhoto, useGetEventPhotos, and useDeleteEventPhoto with proper cache invalidation
acceptanceCriteria: Upload hook handles file to blob conversion and backend upload
Get photos hook fetches and caches event photos from backend
Delete hook invalidates cache after successful deletion
All hooks include loading and error states

file_operations.description: Add three new React Query hooks to the existing hooks file: useUploadEventPhoto (mutation hook that accepts ExternalBlob, contentType, and filename parameters, calls actor.uploadEventPhoto, and invalidates 'eventPhotos' query on success), useGetEventPhotos (query hook that fetches event photos from actor.getEventPhotos with queryKey ['eventPhotos']), and useDeleteEventPhoto (mutation hook that accepts photoId, calls actor.deleteEventPhoto, and invalidates 'eventPhotos' query on success). Follow the existing hook patterns in the file for consistency. All hooks should include proper TypeScript types, loading states, and error handling.
